text: State of TMT - December 2019. [State of Sectors](https://www.abnamro.nl/nl/zakelijk/insights/sectoren-en-trends/stand-van-sectoren/index.html). [Technology, Media & Telecom](https://www.abnamro.nl/nl/zakelijk/insights/sectoren-en-trends/technologie/index.html). ![State of TMT December 2019](https://www.abnamro.nl/nl/media/stand%20van%20tmt_dec19_538_tcm16-65994.jpg). 19/12/2019 • 1 minutes read.

Growth in the Dutch economy is slowing and the economic indicators have worsened. The TMT sector is affected, but continues to perform relatively well. Download the full report. (Do you see no download or are you unable to download the report? Then upgrade your browser to the most recent version.)
[State of TMT (20 December 2019). 1 MB](https://www.abnamro.nl/nl/media/Stand-van-TMT-december-2019_tcm16-66562.pdf)
Economic climate. The economic climate is deteriorating in the Netherlands. The purchasing managers’ index (PMI), producer confidence and consumer confidence have declined in recent quarters. Even so, entrepreneurs in the TMT sector are relatively positive compared with business as a whole.

Staff shortage. What is affecting the TMT sector is a shortage of staff. No fewer than 33% of TMT entrepreneurs say they cannot obtain the required workforce. The shortage is particularly acute in IT. There, 41% of entrepreneurs struggle to find suitable staff.

Read our forecasts in the full report ‘State of TMT’.
[State of TMT (20 December 2019). 1 MB](https://www.abnamro.nl/nl/media/Stand-van-TMT-december-2019_tcm16-66562.pdf)
Read more in the technology sector. Technology, Media & Telecom (TMT) is one of the fastest-growing sectors. Helped by the growing use of software, algorithms and sensors, this sector is driving the digital renewal of other sectors.
